# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $q = trim((string) $request->input('q', ''));
        $category = $request->input('category');
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price');
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price');

        $limit = (int) $request->input('limit', 24);
        if ($limit < 1) $limit = 24;
        if ($limit > 100) $limit = 100;

        $offset = (int) $request->input('offset', 0);
        if ($offset < 0) $offset = 0;

        $sort = (string) $request->input('sort', 'relevance');
        $dir = strtolower((string) $request->input('dir', 'desc')) === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';

        $bindings = [];

        $whereParts = [];
        $whereParts[] = "p.is_active = 1";

        if ($q !== '') {
            $whereParts[] = "(p.name LIKE ? OR p.sku LIKE ?)";
            $bindings[] = '%' . $q . '%';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $q . '%';
        }

        if ($category !== null && $category !== '' && $category !== 'all') {
            if (is_numeric($category)) {
                $whereParts[] = "(p.category_id = ?)";
                $bindings[] = (int) $category;
            } else {
                $whereParts[] = "(c.slug = ?)";
                $bindings[] = (string) $category;
            }
        }

        $minOk = $minPrice !== null && $minPrice !== '' && is_numeric($minPrice);
        $maxOk = $maxPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== '' && is_numeric($maxPrice);

        if ($minOk && $maxOk) {
            $whereParts[] = "(p.price BETWEEN ? AND ?)";
            $bindings[] = (float) $minPrice;
            $bindings[] = (float) $maxPrice;
        } elseif ($minOk) {
            $whereParts[] = "(p.price >= ?)";
            $bindings[] = (float) $minPrice;
        } elseif ($maxOk) {
            $whereParts[] = "(p.price <= ?)";
            $bindings[] = (float) $maxPrice;
        }

        $whereSql = implode(' AND ', $whereParts);

        $scoreExpr = "0";
        if ($q !== '') {
            $scoreExpr = "(CASE WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN p.sku LIKE ? THEN 10 ELSE 0 END)";
            $bindings[] = $q . '%';
            $bindings[] = $q . '%';
        }

        $orderSql = "p.updated_at DESC";
        if ($sort === 'price') {
            $orderSql = "p.price {$dir}, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'newest') {
            $orderSql = "p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'name') {
            $orderSql = "p.name {$dir}, p.id DESC";
        } elseif ($sort === 'relevance') {
            $orderSql = ($q !== '') ? "score DESC, p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC" : "p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC";
        }

        $sql = "
            SELECT
                p.id,
                p.name,
                p.slug,
                p.sku,
                p.price,
                p.currency,
                p.category_id,
                c.name AS category_name,
                c.slug AS category_slug,
                p.image_url,
                p.stock_qty,
                p.updated_at,
                {$scoreExpr} AS score
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
            WHERE {$whereSql}
            ORDER BY {$orderSql}
            LIMIT {$limit} OFFSET {$offset}
        ";

        $products = DB::select(DB::raw($sql), $bindings);

        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
            WHERE {$whereSql}
        ";

        $totalRow = DB::selectOne(DB::raw($countSql), array_slice($bindings, 0, count($bindings) - (($q !== '') ? 2 : 0)));
        $total = (int) ($totalRow->total ?? 0);

        return response()->json([
            'data' => $products,
            'meta' => [
                'q' => $q,
                'category' => $category,
                'min_price' => $minOk ? (float) $minPrice : null,
                'max_price' => $maxOk ? (float) $maxPrice : null,
                'sort' => $sort,
                'dir' => $dir,
                'limit' => $limit,
                'offset' => $offset,
                'total' => $total,
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
